name: AI-Generated-Projects-Index
description: Development projects that were either partially or fully developed using AI.

name: AI-Projects-Index
description: Index of AI project repositories including demos, POCs, system prompts, and related tools.

name: Agents-Index
description: A periodically updated list of AI agent configurations shared on GitHub and related projects.

name: Architectural-Plans-Index
description: Project plans, blueprints, specifications, and design documents for software and hardware projects.

name: Apps-Index
description: Index of apps created, covering AI/LLM tools, audio, browser automation, databases, and more.

name: Awesome-List-Repos-Index
description: Curated index of awesome list repositories covering AI/ML tools, Linux desktop applications, and specialized resource collections.

name: Backup-Projects-Index
description: Index of backup-related projects.

name: Claude-Code-Repos-Index
description: A curated collection of Claude Code projects, agent workspace blueprints, and related resources, organized by use case and category.

name: Context-Projects-Index
description: Index of repositories focused on context management, generation, and processing for AI/LLM systems.

name: Data-Projects-Index
description: Sustainability apps and resources including Streamlit apps for GHG emissions, data visualization, and sustainability reporting.

name: Development-Project-Index
description: A personal tool for indexing public projects across GitHub and Hugging Face platforms, serving as both a project index and an open-source pattern.

name: Docs-And-Notes-Index
description: Index of documentation repositories and notes shared on GitHub, covering AI, context/RAG, backups, development tools, and more.

name: Experiments-And-Evaluations-Index
description: Index of experimental projects, evaluations, proof-of-concepts, templates, patterns, and exploratory ideas related to AI/LLM development and workflows.

name: Home-Assistant-Index
description: Index of Home Assistant related projects.

name: Homebox-Projects-Index
description: A curated index of Homebox-related projects and tools including MCP server integration, backup GUI, and AI assistants.

name: Index
description: Automatically generated master index of Daniel Rosehill's public GitHub repositories with multiple browsing views.

name: Index-Of-Indices
description: A meta-index that catalogs the various indexing repositories organized across GitHub.

name: Israel-Projects-Index
description: A comprehensive index of Israel-related repositories, datasets, and Hugging Face spaces.

name: Jewish-Related-Index
description: Index of Jewish-related projects on GitHub covering AI tools, Home Assistant automations for Shabbat/Yom Tov, and Torah tech resources.

name: MCP-Projects-Index
description: Index of MCP (Model Context Protocol) projects including completed servers, implementation notes, and planning documents.

name: My-Docs-Index
description: Index of documentation repositories with links to the docs website at docs.bydanielrosehill.com.

name: N8N-Workflows-Index
description: Index of N8N workflow repositories including voice note processing, AI agent workflows, and workflow sanitization tools.

name: Networking-Projects-Index
description: Index of networking-related projects.

name: Prompt-Libraries-Index
description: A curated collection of prompt libraries for various LLM applications, including system prompts, user prompts, and specialized tools.

name: Speech-And-ASR-Evaluations
description: Index of evaluations and experiments assessing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Speech-to-Text (STT) system performance under various conditions.

name: Speech-Tech-Index
description: Index of speech technology repositories, tools, and resources including ASR fine-tuning and voice models.

name: Voice-Apps-Index
description: Index of voice typing, dictation, and speech-to-text applications and utilities.

name: WIP-Index
description: Index of work-in-progress repositories at various stages of development, from early ideas and planning notes to partially built tools.
